untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires visual identification of specific chart formations (rounded Eve top vs. pointed Adam top, twin-peak morphology, valley depth ~9%, price variance ~1%, temporal spacing ~25 days, third peak absence) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The pattern recognition involves subjective peak/valley classification and relative shape analysis not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Converted available quantitative signals: uptrend confirmation via price above SMA_20 (line A rise), volume ratio > 1.0 for heavier left-peak volume. Exit uses SMA_20 crossover as reversal signal. Original 72% success rate and 19% average decline noted but not encoded as targets. Measured move calculation excluded per source text guidance. Pattern visual components (Eve/Adam morphology, exact spacing, valley measurement) require untranslatable chart pattern recognition.
